runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "JavaScript", "build_system": "pnpm", "package_manager": "pnpm", "build_commands": ["npm install -g pnpm", "pnpm i --frozen-lockfile", "pnpm build"], "install_commands": [], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "20", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "web_service", "base_image": "node: slim", "base_image_rationale": "Official Node.js slim image as build stage base to install dependencies and run the Vue/Vite build.", "pitfalls": ["The production stage in the Dockerfile uses nginx:stable-alpine, which is not listed in the provided official images list; pin to a closest match like nginx:stable-alpine3.23-perl and adjust as needed.", "nginx.conf must exist in the repo and be copied into the container; if nginx.conf is missing, the production image will fail to start or have a default config misalignment."], "notes": "This blueprint follows a two-stage build (node for building the frontend, nginx for serving the built assets). The project uses pnpm as the package manager and builds with Vite. Node version referenced by CI is 20, so Node-compatible base images should be used for consistency. Ensure dist is produced by the build and nginx serves /usr/share/nginx/html."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# build stage
FROM node:slim AS build-stage

# Set environment variables for non-interactive npm installs
ENV NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn
ENV CI true
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the entire project and install dependencies then build
COPY . .

RUN npm install -g pnpm && pnpm i --frozen-lockfile
RUN pnpm build

# production stage
FROM nginx:stable-alpine3.23-perl AS production-stage

# Copy built assets from build stage to nginx html folder
COPY --from=build-stage /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy nginx config (must exist in repo)
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

# Expose port 80
EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# build stage
FROM node:slim AS build-stage

# Set environment variables for non-interactive npm installs
ENV NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn
ENV CI true
WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies
COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml ./
RUN npm install -g pnpm && pnpm i --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the application and build
COPY . .
RUN pnpm build

# production stage
FROM nginx:stable-alpine3.23-perl AS production-stage

# Copy built assets from build stage to nginx html folder
COPY --from=build-stage /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy nginx config (must exist in repo)
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

# Expose port 80
EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# build stage
FROM node:slim AS build-stage

# Set environment variables for non-interactive npm installs
ENV NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn
ENV CI true
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the entire project and install dependencies then build
COPY . .

RUN npm install -g pnpm && pnpm i --frozen-lockfile
RUN pnpm build

# production stage
FROM nginx:stable-alpine3.23-perl AS production-stage

# Copy built assets from build stage to nginx html folder
COPY --from=build-stage /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy nginx config (must exist in repo)
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

# Expose port 80
EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
"}

artifacts.content:
# build stage
FROM node:slim AS build-stage

# Set environment variables for non-interactive npm installs
ENV NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn
ENV CI true
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the entire project and install dependencies then build
COPY . .

RUN npm install -g pnpm && pnpm i --frozen-lockfile
RUN pnpm build

# production stage
FROM nginx:stable-alpine3.23-perl AS production-stage

# Copy built assets from build stage to nginx html folder
COPY --from=build-stage /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy nginx config (must exist in repo)
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

# Expose port 80
EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
